candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Cash flow change line, not the stock variable ACT.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Specific non-current asset line, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact balance sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash-related but typically excluded from CHE when a separate cash and cash equivalents line exists.
Cash flow ending balance ties to cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Used the exact balance sheet cash line; excluded restricted cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Cash flow change line, not the stock variable LCT.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the exact balance sheet total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: This appears in the current liabilities section and is the cleanest reported current debt line; appropriate for short-term debt/current portion of borrowings.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Semantically relevant candidate for current maturities, but reported as zero across periods and likely supplemental rather than the main current debt line.
Semantically relevant but values are blank in preview; could be an alternate label in some years.
Could represent short-term borrowings in some years, but likely a component rather than the clean total.
Cash flow issuance line, not the balance sheet stock variable STD.

variables.notes: Chose the current-section 'Loans and borrowings' line outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest balance-sheet stock measure of current debt. Excluded lease obligations and avoided combining with maturities lines to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Tax-related but non-current deferred tax, not taxes payable/current tax liability.
Current tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: No clear current taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable row is present on the balance sheet preview.

candidates.row_label: Property and equipment for own use
candidates.why: Best match to property, plant and equipment; appears to be the reported PPE line even though preview values are blank.
PPE-related component, but not the preferred total PPE line.
PPE-related component, but not the preferred total PPE line.
Real estate held for investment, distinct from PPE under IFRS.

final_choice.row_label: Property and equipment for own use

variables.notes: Selected the most likely total PPE row. Blank recent preview values do not invalidate the label; it may be used in other years.
